title: Moberhaul
description: Mobs overhauled... if the name wasn't self explanatory enough lol
body:
## DISCLAIMER: You need to install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to run this resource pack, otherwise it won't work as intended.

Moberhaul aims to update the textures and models for monsters in a way that I personally think looks better and more consistent with the modern versions of the game.

Currently, not every monster has been remodeled, but I will be updating more of them in the future (except animals, they will be remodeled in a separate resource pack)

![Current models in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0249bc12e48a0d30c25f789e58dd6f1fe5ee9fe5.png)
![Mobs updated in V1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93307263f3ef06eeb513abb8ddcbfff72f5affdb.png)

This is my first resource pack and I still have to improve my skills, so I will keep updating these textures if possible, constructive feedback is always appreciated.

### Planned features:
- More mob remodels
- Variants (Not necessarily for every mob though)
- Name tag easter eggs
- Fresh Animations compatibility
- Bare Bones compatibility
- Bedrock port
